name: @prmaat/langchain
description: PrMaat LangChain integration. A BaseCallbackHandler that signs every LangGraph event with the agent's W3C DID before it hits LangSmith — so traces become cryptographically attributable, not just framework-self-attested. Implements PrMaat Verification Spec v0.1 §4.3 (checkpoint-bound payload binding to avoid signature/trace desync under async streaming).
